ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Largest city in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of crime statistics */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "violent_crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of violent crimes per 100,000 inhabitants */,
  "murder_rate" REAL /* Rate of murder and non-negligent manslaughter per 100,000 inhabitants */,
  "forcible_rape_rate" REAL /* Rate of forcible rape per 100,000 inhabitants */,
  "robbery_rate" REAL /* Rate of robbery per 100,000 inhabitants */,
  "aggravated_assault_rate" REAL /* Rate of aggravated assault per 100,000 inhabitants */,
  "property_crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of property crimes per 100,000 inhabitants */,
  "burglary_rate" REAL /* Rate of burglary per 100,000 inhabitants */,
  "larceny_theft_rate" REAL /* Rate of larceny-theft per 100,000 inhabitants */,
  "motor_vehicle_theft_rate" REAL /* Rate of motor vehicle theft per 100,000 inhabitants */,
  "total_crimes" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes */,
  "crime_rate_per_100k" REAL /* Crime rate per 100,000 inhabitants */,
  "violent_crime_rate_per_100k" REAL /* Violent crime rate per 100,000 inhabitants */,
  "property_crime_rate_per_100k" REAL /* Property crime rate per 100,000 inhabitants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violent_crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violent crime type */,
  "crime_name" TEXT /* Name of the violent crime */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the violent crime */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the violent crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property crime type */,
  "crime_name" TEXT /* Name of the property crime */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property crime */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the property crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crimes_reported" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime report record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the reported crime */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the crime occurred */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crime reported */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of reported incidents */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime was reported */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_reported_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES property_crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_reported_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES violent_crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_reported_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES crime_statistics ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_reported_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of access */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the system (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generated report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, CSV file) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the data import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of the rule (e.g., format, range) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)
